name: Tejas Smoked Turkey Salad with Almond-Anaheim
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast all peppers and chiles over an open flame until the skin blisters. Place them in a covered bowl or plastic bag until the skin begins to loosen. Peel, seed, and cut into 1/2-inch dice.
2. Combine diced peppers, turkey, and celery in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Make Almond-Anaheim Dressing.
4. Toss salad with dressing and adjust seasonings to your preference. Serve salad sprinkled with toasted almonds and garnished with fresh fruits.
